title: Petroleum Reporting (Miscellaneous Amendments) Act 2026
text: Petroleum Reporting (Miscellaneous Amendments) Act 2026 An Act to amend the Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) Act 2010 , the Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) (Code of Practice for Fuel Price Reporting) Regulations 2020 , the Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) Infringement Regulations 2021 , the Energy Co-ordination and Planning Act 1995 and the Petroleum Products Emergency Act 1994 [Royal Assent 2 April 2026] Be it enacted by Her Excellency the Governor of Tasmania, by and with the advice and consent of the Legislative Council and House of Assembly, in Parliament assembled, as follows: PART 1 - Preliminary 1. Short title This Act may be cited as the Petroleum Reporting (Miscellaneous Amendments) Act 2026 . 2. Commencement This Act commences on the day on which this Act receives the Royal Assent. 3. Repeal of Act This Act is repealed on the first anniversary of the day on which it commenced. PART 2 - Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) Act 2010 Amended 4. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) Act 2010 . 5. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) Act 2010 . 6. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) Act 2010 . 7. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) Act 2010 . 8. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) Act 2010 . PART 3 - Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) (Code of Practice for Fuel Price Reporting) Regulations 2020 Amended 9. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) (Code of Practice for Fuel Price Reporting) Regulations 2020 . 10. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) (Code of Practice for Fuel Price Reporting) Regulations 2020 . 11. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) (Code of Practice for Fuel Price Reporting) Regulations 2020 . PART 4 - Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) Infringement Regulations 2021 Amended 12. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) Infringement Regulations 2021 . 13. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Australian Consumer Law (Tasmania) Infringement Regulations 2021 . PART 5 - Energy Co-ordination and Planning Act 1995 Amended 14. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Energy Co-ordination and Planning Act 1995 . 15. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Energy Co-ordination and Planning Act 1995 . 16. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Energy Co-ordination and Planning Act 1995 . 17. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Energy Co-ordination and Planning Act 1995 . PART 6 - Petroleum Products Emergency Act 1994 Amended 18. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Petroleum Products Emergency Act 1994 . 19. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Petroleum Products Emergency Act 1994 . 20. The amendments effected by this Part have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Petroleum Products Emergency Act 1994 . from top.html -->
